fundamentals.name: Datadog, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Datadog, Inc. operates an observability and security platform for cloud applications in the United States and internationally. The company's products comprise infrastructure and application performance monitoring, log management, observability pipelines, synthetics, real user monitoring, product analytics, continuous profiler, database monitoring, data observability, LLM observability, error tracking, network monitoring, incident response, workflow automation and App builder, event management, bits AI SRE, cloud cost management, cloud security, code security, cloud SIEM, threat management, sensitive data scanner, and CI visibility. Datadog, Inc. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in New York, New York.

judgment.summary: Rapidly growing company with strong revenue and earnings growth, but high valuation multiples and thin operating margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 18.3%; next earnings date is 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 32.2% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Earnings growth 104.0% YoY — significant profitability improvement.
Quarterly earnings growth 113.4% — accelerating profit gains.
Free cash flow $936.73M TTM — healthy cash generation.
Consensus 'strong_buy' with a mean target of $223.93.
negatives: Trailing P/E 582.94 and Forward P/E 77.83 — very high valuation.
Operating margin 0.8% and Profit margin 3.7% — thin profitability despite revenue growth.
Return on assets -0.2% — inefficient asset utilization.
Debt/Equity 32.22 — leverage is present, though manageable with current cash.

news.paragraph: Datadog is benefiting from the production phase of AI, with recent reports highlighting its strong Q1 performance, exceeding $1 billion in revenue and leading to a raised 2026 outlook. An analyst at BTIG raised the price target to $255, reinforcing a 'strong buy' consensus among 47 analysts. The stock has also flashed a golden cross signal, suggesting positive momentum.
